project_context.emotion: Trust, clarity, functional efficiency, automotive excitement

theme_and_archetype.reasoning: A marketplace needs high trust and functional clarity. The UI should fade into the background so the car images can be the hero. A Swiss/Brutalist approach with stark white backgrounds, structural greys, and high-contrast signal red accents creates authority and clear conversion paths.

rules: Headings must use tracking-tight or tracking-tighter.
Labels/Overlines must be uppercase, tiny, and have wide spacing.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing Philosophy. Use 2-3x more spacing than typical designs.

surface_styles.cards: Flat solid surfaces with a 1px subtle border (border-gray-200), no drop shadows by default. On hover: slight lift (-translate-y-1) and shadow-lg.
surface_styles.header: Solid White background with 1px bottom border (border-gray-200) for high readability.

buttons.primary: bg-[#E63946] text-white font-semibold px-6 py-3 rounded-none transition-all hover:bg-[#D62828] hover:-translate-y-0.5
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border-2 border-[#0A0A0A] text-[#0A0A0A] font-semibold px-6 py-3 rounded-none transition-all hover:bg-[#F3F4F6]

forms_and_inputs.style: Shadcn components heavily customized to match the Swiss aesthetic. Sharp corners (rounded-none). 1px solid borders.

images.aspect_ratios: 4:3 for car grid items, 16:9 for hero sections, 3:2 for gallery items.
images.treatment: Never overlay heavy gradients on car images. If text overlay is needed, use a subtle black gradient at the bottom 20% only.

icons.style: Clean, unembellished 24px default size, matching text color unless indicating status.

landing_page.hero: Massive search bar front-and-center. 'Klarer, vertrauenswürdiger Marketplace-Look'. Background image of a car on a scenic road, subtle overlay so search stands out.
landing_page.featured_cars: Grid of top cars. Large images, minimal text (Brand, Model, Price, Year, Mileage).

search_results.layout: Sidebar on the left for filters (Marke, Preis, Baujahr, Kilometer, Kraftstoff). Grid on the right for results. Sticky header for quick access to search term modification.

car_detail.layout: 2-column layout on desktop. Left column (60-70%): Massive image gallery, detailed description, specs table. Right column (30-40%): Sticky sidebar with Price, Dealer Name, Contact/Inquiry Form (Anfrageformular).

dealer_dashboard.layout: Sachlich und effizient (Matter-of-fact and efficient). Sidebar navigation. Main content area uses dense data tables for listing management. Clear 'Neues Fahrzeug anlegen' (Add New Car) button.
dealer_dashboard.listing_form: Multi-step or clean long-scroll form. Includes a prominent 'KI-Beschreibung generieren' (Generate AI Description) button using GPT-5.2 mock.

admin_panel.layout: Similar to dealer dashboard but with super-user views: Dealer overview, listing approval queue, moderation tools.

hero_backgrounds.description: Dark mountain road, great for landing page background

technical_and_accessibility.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute using kebab-case role-based naming (e.g., 'login-form-submit-button', 'car-search-input', 'dealer-inquiry-button').
technical_and_accessibility.accessibility: Minimum 4.5:1 contrast ratio for normal text. Use focus rings on all interactive elements. Add aria-hidden='true' to purely decorative elements.
technical_and_accessibility.file_structure: Since the project uses .js files, all React components should be written in JavaScript (.js or .jsx), not TypeScript. Prop-types should be used for validation if necessary.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Initialize Tailwind with the specified colors and fonts. 2. Implement Shadcn primitives customized to the Swiss & High-Contrast archetype (rounded-none, high contrast borders). 3. Build the public marketplace layout first (Hero Search, Listing Grid), then the car detail page. 4. Implement the B2B Dealer Dashboard with a focus on data density and clear actions. 5. Integrate the mocked GPT-5.2 API for the AI description generator in the listing creation flow. 6. Use the provided media URLs exclusively for visuals. 7. Add data-testid attributes to all interactive elements.
